creator: mi+thun@aldan.algebra.com
text:
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/147274

Attached is the modified version of the patch. As with cairo-dock, I 
changed the PORTVERSION to 2.1.3.9. I also declare USE_DOS2UNIX, because 
some of the sources now contain DOS' EOL symbols.

I added an explicit run-dependency on wget, because some of the plugins 
use it to submit data via HTTP POST. Other plugins use curl, which is 
brought in implicitly by the etpan dependency. (It would be nice, if the 
wget-users were converted to curl, so we could reduce the number of 
dependencies here. Seems like the conversion is already happening 
upstream, though.)

Ivan, if you approve (and miwi@ does not object), I can commit the 
upgrades to both cairo-dock ports for you.

Thanks! Yours,

    -mi
